findings.description: The complex spatial layout of the original map document is not preserved, resulting in a single-column linear layout.
findings.evidence: The PDF features a multi-region layout with a central map overlaid with data tables, a title block occupying the right margin, and notes in the bottom left corner. The HTML renders all extracted text elements (titles, metadata, legend, tables, notes) sequentially in a single column below or above the main map image.

findings.description: Text color formatting conveying potential meaning is lost in the extracted tables.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the text 'RES HI: 1.7' within the callout box for SD-5 is colored red, which may indicate an exceedance or special status. In the HTML's extracted table for SD-5, this text is rendered in the default black color.
